evals.prompt: Generate Meta image creatives for the ISKM Singapore Weekend Love Feast event. Goal is registrations. Use the reference image folder I'll provide.
evals.expected_output: Inventory references → build concept board with religious-grounded voice register → atmospheric / prasadam / typographic concepts only (no AI deity / face redraws) → 4-6 concepts × 2-3 variations × 1:1 + 4:5 → mostly nano_banana_flash unlimited + 1 gpt_image_2 hero per concept → dashboard.html with Sanskrit-safe typography

assertions.name: religious_guardrail
assertions.description: No deity reference is asked to be AI-redrawn — only composite-into-design path

assertions.name: ultra_default_tier
assertions.description: majority of variations use nano_banana_flash (unlimited on Ultra)

assertions.name: aspect_matrix
assertions.description: Each concept produces 1:1 + 4:5 for Meta feed placements

assertions.name: no_em_dashes
assertions.description: No em dashes anywhere in generated prompts or text-on-image

evals.prompt: Take the ad-copywriter image-prompts.json output for Thrive Retreats and generate the actual creatives.
evals.expected_output: Form A path: parse_brief.py reads image-prompts.json → concept-board with auto-attached lifestyle/UGC references → marketing_studio_image for product hero, soul_2 for UGC variants → dashboard.html ready for Mayank to pick winners

assertions.name: ad_copywriter_handoff_clean
assertions.description: Every image-prompt entry from ad-copywriter becomes at least one concept

assertions.name: ugc_routing
assertions.description: UGC-tagged concepts route to soul_2 / marketing_studio_image, not nano_banana_flash

assertions.name: manifest_sourcelabel
assertions.description: manifest.json entries source-labeled [GENERATED] with model + seed + prompt

evals.prompt: I have 80 reference images for ISKM Singapore. Inventory and tag them so we can use them across all upcoming campaigns.
evals.expected_output: inventory_references.py walks folder → SHA-dedup → upload-queue → Claude in-session uploads via media_upload + media_confirm → patches manifest with UUIDs → reports sacred count, face count, consent-unknown count → blocks generation queue from using consent-unknown faces until resolved

assertions.name: deity_locked_input_only
assertions.description: Every deity image has usage_scope=input_only_no_redraw + ai_redraw_allowed=false

assertions.name: consent_blocking
assertions.description: Faces without cleared consent are blocked from paid use

assertions.name: auto_attach_intents
assertions.description: Each image has auto_attach_to_concepts_with_intent populated based on subject_type

assertions.name: idempotent_reupload
assertions.description: Re-running on same folder skips already-uploaded SHA matches

evals.prompt: Generate 12 ad creative variations for Thrive's autumn promo to test in Meta.
evals.expected_output: Concept board with 4 distinct angles × 3 variations each → cost-aware routing (8 free Nano Banana Flash + 4 paid Marketing Studio Image) → all under 60-credit budget → dashboard for Mayank to pick top 5

assertions.name: variation_count
assertions.description: 12 variations generated as requested, not arbitrary other number

assertions.name: differentiation
assertions.description: Variations within a concept are meaningfully different (composition rotation, premium tier)

evals.prompt: I want a hero image for the Wabo landing page. 16:9 desktop and 9:16 mobile. Premium feel.
evals.expected_output: Single concept hero_landing intent → cinematic_studio_2_5 routing → 16:9 + 9:16 variations × 2 each → dashboard with 4 hero candidates → final picks moved to creatives/ for landing-page-builder to embed

assertions.name: hero_routing
assertions.description: Routes to cinematic_studio_2_5 (premium hero) not nano_banana_flash

assertions.name: downstream_flag
assertions.description: Output flags landing-page-builder as ready downstream consumer
